subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Be thou attracted by My melodies, then drink from the cup of My loving-kindness, and abide beneath the shade of My clouds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی ان اجتذبی من نغماتی ثم اشربی من کاس عنایتی ثم استظلی فی ظل سحاب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @mindfulness; concentration; focus
